methods.name: V-LOAM2015
methods.note: V-LOAM2015: visual-lidar odometry port with range-image pseudo-visual bootstrapping and LiDAR scan-to-map refinement; global mapping/loop closure are out of scope on KITTI PCD. visual_points/frame=104.782016 visual_lines/frame=56.312443 fused_lines/frame=246.752044 plane_corr/frame=3648.004541 point_corr/frame=98.641235 line_corr/frame=239.233424 point_scale/frame=0.828832 line_scale/frame=1.352701 fallback_frames=0 mean|residual|=0.184767

methods.name: TC-VLO
methods.note: TC-VLO: tightly coupled vision-lidar odometry port with separate visual point and LiDAR voxel maps jointly optimized through plane, point, and line residuals. visual_points/frame=98.750227 visual_lines/frame=56.312443 fused_lines/frame=246.752044 plane_corr/frame=3646.132607 point_corr/frame=92.610354 line_corr/frame=239.171662 point_scale/frame=0.817417 line_scale/frame=1.374783 fallback_frames=0 mean|residual|=0.184582

methods.name: AD-VLO
methods.note: AD-VLO: direct visual-laser odometry port with occlusion-aware range discontinuity gating, planar patch emphasis, and LiDAR scan-to-map refinement. visual_points/frame=87.840145 visual_lines/frame=39.237057 fused_lines/frame=239.574024 plane_corr/frame=3644.336058 point_corr/frame=81.900999 line_corr/frame=232.284287 point_scale/frame=0.802001 line_scale/frame=1.417456 fallback_frames=0 mean|residual|=0.183511

methods.name: TC-MVLO
methods.note: TC-MVLO: tightly coupled monocular visual-lidar odometry port using range-image visual points, fused visual/LiDAR line support, and LiDAR scan-to-map constraints; loop closure is out of scope. visual_points/frame=98.750227 visual_lines/frame=56.312443 fused_lines/frame=246.752044 plane_corr/frame=3648.391462 point_corr/frame=92.675749 line_corr/frame=239.230699 point_scale/frame=0.815797 line_scale/frame=1.359036 fallback_frames=0 mean|residual|=0.183932
